prompt: Using the reference of a single bacterial cell, generate a microscopy image of a bacterial colony.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic microscopy image of a bacterial colony. The colony should appear as a dense cluster of numerous rod-shaped bacterial cells, replicating the distinctive purplish hue and morphological features, including pili and flagella, of the single bacterium shown in image 1. Maintain a dark background, consistent with the visual style of image 1.
objects: dense cluster of numerous rod-shaped bacterial cells
